title: Ashen + No Tree Punching Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding  compatibility between Ashen 16x and No Tree Punching
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)? Tired of certain blocks and tools using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
